name: foostack
description: fullstack webapp horizontally scalable using socketio and openpgp
author: Florian Blanc

scripts.blobparts: export NODE_ENV=production FOOSTACK_DEV=no && node ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config-name blobparts && node ./scripts/make-worker-blobs.js
scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=production FOOSTACK_DEV=yes && npm run blobparts && node ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config-name web && node ./src/server.js
scripts.build: export NODE_ENV=production FOOSTACK_DEV=no && npm run blobparts && node ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config-name web && npm run htmljs && node ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config-name server && node ./scripts/edit-build.js
scripts.prod: export NODE_ENV=production FOOSTACK_DEV=no && npm run build && node ./src/server.bundle.js
